message: No fee schedule rows are configured.
whyItMatters: Without a fee schedule, expected reimbursement cannot be computed and contractual adjustments at ERA posting will be guessed.
resolution: Load your payer fee schedule(s) on the Billing Defaults settings page.

message: One or more fee schedule rows have a non-positive allowed amount.
whyItMatters: Allowed amounts of zero or less cause negative or zero expected payments and break contractual adjustment math at ERA posting.
resolution: Correct the allowed amount for each procedure code listed in evidence.

message: One or more procedure codes appear in the fee schedule more than once.
whyItMatters: Duplicate procedure codes make the chosen allowed amount ambiguous and lead to inconsistent expected-payment math.
resolution: Consolidate or scope (by payer/modifier/POS) the duplicate codes listed in evidence.

message: One or more fee schedule rows are past their expiration date.
whyItMatters: Expired fee schedule rows can mask the lack of a current contracted rate and produce stale expected-payment values.
resolution: Renew or archive the expired rows listed in evidence on the Billing Defaults settings page.
